title: Merch Viz Manga NGE Volume 14 Release info
display_title: Merch Viz Manga NGE Volume 14 Release info
wikitext:
[]: [Merch] Viz Manga NGE Volume 14 Release info? Post by Popuvamp » Sun Feb 23, 2014 5:24 pm Sorry if this was discussed already, but any news when viz will release volume 14, the final volume of the nge manga in the USA in English? I can only find volumes 1-13 and I couldn't find any news on the status of the final volume. Thank you!!!

[]: Post by pwhodges » Sun Feb 23, 2014 5:34 pm As far as I can find, there is no news yet. I hope that as with volume 13 they will take the time to make a simultaneous English release. I am worried that they might delay its appearance to make it come out at the same time as the Final film, like volume 13 came out at the same time as Q.

[]: Post by cyharding » Sun Feb 23, 2014 9:17 pm It is supposed to be coming out this spring, but I've heard nothing on the exact time. Like pwhodges, I hope there will be a simultaneous English release with it.

[]: Re: Viz Manga NGE Volume 14 Release info? Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Feb 23, 2014 10:03 pm Popuvamp wrote: I couldn't find any news on the status of the final volume. Thank you!!!

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Feb 24, 2014 11:48 pm Japanese Volume 14 is supposed to be out Spring 2014 , according to a reliable Japanese fan blog (October 2013). Like Cyharding and pwhodges wrote, it's assumed that there will be a simultaneous release like with Volume 13 (U.S. and Japan) but no word yet.

I can only find volumes 1-13 and I couldn't find any news on the status of the final volume. Thank you!!!

I am worried that they might delay its appearance to make it come out at the same time as the Final film, like volume 13 came out at the same time as Q.
